requirement_topic.en: KUCAS / PAI Import Conformity and BESS Product Safety — IEC 62619, IEC 62133, IEC 62933-5-2, and GSO Context
requirement_topic.zh: KUCAS / PAI进口合格评定及BESS产品安全——IEC 62619、IEC 62133、IEC 62933-5-2及GSO背景
requirement_topic.zht: KUCAS / PAI進口合格評定及BESS產品安全——IEC 62619、IEC 62133、IEC 62933-5-2及GSO背景

summary.en: Kuwait's Public Authority for Industry (PAI) administers standards and conformity services, including the Kuwait Conformity Assurance Scheme (KUCAS) route for regulated imports. As of the dataset date, a publicly confirmed Kuwait technical regulation dedicated specifically to stationary BESS was not identified. Where BESS components are within KUCAS or GSO/IEC standard scope, importers should expect certificate-of-conformity review before customs clearance. For industrial lithium BESS cells and batteries, IEC 62619 is the relevant international safety baseline; IEC 62133 may apply to portable sealed cells and batteries where relevant; and IEC 62933-5-2 is the relevant system-safety reference for electrochemical energy storage. GSO-adopted IEC standards may be requested in Kuwait conformity or project review. Scope must be confirmed with PAI/KUCAS, the importer, and any appointed conformity assessment body before shipment.
summary.zh: 科威特公共工业局（PAI）负责标准和合格评定服务，包括受监管进口产品的科威特合格保证计划（KUCAS）路径。截至本数据集日期，尚未发现公开确认的科威特固定式BESS专项技术法规。若BESS组件属于KUCAS或GSO/IEC标准范围，进口商应预期在清关前接受符合性证书审查。对于工业用锂BESS电芯和电池，IEC 62619是相关国际安全基准；在涉及便携式密封电芯和电池时，IEC 62133可能适用；IEC 62933-5-2是电化学储能系统安全的相关参考。科威特合格评定或项目审查可能要求GSO采纳的IEC标准。出货前须与PAI/KUCAS、进口商及任何指定合格评定机构确认范围。
summary.zht: 科威特公共工業局（PAI）負責標準和合格評定服務，包括受監管進口產品的科威特合格保證計畫（KUCAS）路徑。截至本數據集日期，尚未發現公開確認的科威特固定式BESS專項技術法規。若BESS組件屬於KUCAS或GSO/IEC標準範圍，進口商應預期在清關前接受符合性證書審查。對於工業用鋰BESS電芯和電池，IEC 62619是相關國際安全基準；在涉及便攜式密封電芯和電池時，IEC 62133可能適用；IEC 62933-5-2是電化學儲能系統安全的相關參考。科威特合格評定或項目審查可能要求GSO採納的IEC標準。出貨前須與PAI/KUCAS、進口商及任何指定合格評定機構確認範圍。

standards_or_laws: KUCAS — Kuwait Conformity Assurance Scheme administered under the Public Authority for Industry (scope must be confirmed before shipment)
GSO standards and GSO-adopted IEC standards — applicable where Kuwait/GCC conformity assessment references them
IEC 62619 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications
IEC 62133 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary cells and batteries, where product scope applies
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems

summary.en: China-side BESS safety files commonly include GB/T 36558-2023 system requirements, GB/T 34120-2023 distribution-network connection requirements, NB/T 42090 converter test evidence, and manufacturer safety test reports. These are not automatically accepted as Kuwait KUCAS, GSO, or IEC evidence. If the Kuwait importer or conformity body asks for IEC 62619, IEC 62133, IEC 62933-5-2, or GSO-adopted IEC certificates, China domestic GB/T or NB/T reports must be supplemented by the requested IEC/GSO documentation from an acceptable laboratory or certification body.
summary.zh: 中国侧BESS安全文件通常包括GB/T 36558-2023系统要求、GB/T 34120-2023配电网接入要求、NB/T 42090变流器测试证据，以及制造商安全测试报告。这些文件不会自动被接受为科威特KUCAS、GSO或IEC证据。若科威特进口商或合格评定机构要求IEC 62619、IEC 62133、IEC 62933-5-2或GSO采纳IEC证书，中国国内GB/T或NB/T报告须补充可接受实验室或认证机构出具的相应IEC/GSO文件。
summary.zht: 中國側BESS安全文件通常包括GB/T 36558-2023系統要求、GB/T 34120-2023配電網接入要求、NB/T 42090變流器測試證據，以及製造商安全測試報告。這些文件不會自動被接受為科威特KUCAS、GSO或IEC證據。若科威特進口商或合格評定機構要求IEC 62619、IEC 62133、IEC 62933-5-2或GSO採納IEC證書，中國國內GB/T或NB/T報告須補充可接受實驗室或認證機構出具的相應IEC/GSO文件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Critical gap: China domestic safety evidence does not prove Kuwait import conformity. Exporters should classify each shipment item with the importer, determine whether KUCAS CoC is required, confirm whether Kuwait/GSO-adopted IEC standards apply, prepare IEC 62619 evidence for industrial lithium cells and batteries, add IEC 62133 only where the product scope fits portable sealed cells or batteries, and obtain written acceptance criteria from the appointed conformity assessment body before manufacturing release.
gap.zh: 关键差距：中国国内安全证据不能证明科威特进口合格。出口商应与进口商逐项进行货物分类，确认是否需要KUCAS符合性证书，确认是否适用科威特/GSO采纳IEC标准，为工业用锂电芯和电池准备IEC 62619证据，仅在产品范围符合便携式密封电芯或电池时补充IEC 62133，并在制造放行前从指定合格评定机构取得书面验收标准。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：中國國內安全證據不能證明科威特進口合格。出口商應與進口商逐項進行貨物分類，確認是否需要KUCAS符合性證書，確認是否適用科威特/GSO採納IEC標準，為工業用鋰電芯和電池準備IEC 62619證據，僅在產品範圍符合便攜式密封電芯或電池時補充IEC 62133，並在製造放行前從指定合格評定機構取得書面驗收標準。

mandatory_status.target: Potentially mandatory at import where the product is within KUCAS or applicable Kuwait/GSO regulated scope; BESS-specific public Kuwait technical regulation not confirmed as of dataset date
mandatory_status.cn: Domestic China GB/T and NB/T evidence may be required by project or buyer, but it is not a substitute for Kuwait KUCAS/GSO/IEC acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat KUCAS/PAI scope confirmation as a pre-shipment task for China-origin BESS. No public Kuwait-specific stationary BESS technical regulation was confirmed, but IEC 62619, applicable GSO-adopted IEC standards, IEC 62133 where scope fits, and IEC 62933-5-2 system-safety evidence may be requested. China GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090 are not accepted by themselves as Kuwait conformity evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对中国原产BESS，应将KUCAS/PAI范围确认作为装运前事项。尚未确认公开的科威特固定式BESS专项技术法规，但可能要求IEC 62619、适用GSO采纳IEC标准、范围适用时的IEC 62133，以及IEC 62933-5-2系统安全证据。中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090本身不被接受为科威特合格评定证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對中國原產BESS，應將KUCAS/PAI範圍確認作為裝運前事項。尚未確認公開的科威特固定式BESS專項技術法規，但可能要求IEC 62619、適用GSO採納IEC標準、範圍適用時的IEC 62133，以及IEC 62933-5-2系統安全證據。中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090本身不被接受為科威特合格評定證據。
